Package org.apache.juneau.marshall

Class MarshalledAnnotation.Builder

java.lang.Object
org.apache.juneau.commons.AnnotationObject.Builder
org.apache.juneau.marshall.MarshalledAnnotation.Builder
Enclosing class:
MarshalledAnnotation
public static class MarshalledAnnotation.Builder extends AnnotationObject.Builder
Builder class.
